title: Stablecoin issuers and fintechs race to own payment rails
message_html: Stablecoin issuers and fintechs race to own payment rails ...
snippet: Leading crypto and fintech companies are competing to capture growing revenue from stablecoin payments by launching their own settlement infrastructure.
